blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
